heading: Today
text: Rain, showers, then scattered showers and strong thunderstorm this afternoon. Windy.
temperature: 65 to 70 northeast, 70s west and south of I-89

heading: Thursday Night
text: Showers and storms ending. Partial clearing.

heading: Friday
text: Partly sunny. More afternoon clouds, a rising chance of showers and storms north.

heading: Saturday
text: Breezy; showers likely north; chance south.
